message: Changed the release-only workflow package metadata step to use a hashtable splat so script parameters bind by name. Validation: local hashtable invocation of ./scripts/check-package-metadata.ps1 reached package metadata checks and failed only on stale package repository commits, not on a literal -PackageDirectory path.

Verified .github/workflows/ci.yml uses hashtable splatting for check-package-metadata.ps1 and locally ran tag-equivalent invocation with GITHUB_REF=refs/tags/v0.1.0; check-package-metadata.ps1 passed for 12 packages.
